scripts.install:all: npm install && cd auth-services && npm install && cd ../user-services && npm install && cd ../subscription-service && npm install && cd ../notification-service && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n gateway,auth,user,subscription,notification -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:user" "npm run dev:subscription" "npm run dev:notification"
scripts.start: concurrently -n gateway,auth,user,subscription,notification -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:user" "npm run start:subscription" "npm run start:notification"
scripts.db:generate: cd auth-services && npm run prisma:generate && cd ../user-services && npm run prisma:generate && cd ../subscription-service && npm run prisma:generate && cd ../notification-service && npm run prisma:generate
scripts.db:migrate: cd auth-services && npm run prisma:migrate && cd ../user-services && npm run prisma:migrate && cd ../subscription-service && npm run prisma:migrate && cd ../notification-service && npm run prisma:migrate
scripts.db:push: cd auth-services && npm run prisma:push && cd ../user-services && npm run prisma:push && cd ../subscription-service && npm run prisma:push && cd ../notification-service && npm run prisma:push
scripts.db:deploy: cd auth-services && npm run prisma:deploy && cd ../user-services && npm run prisma:deploy && cd ../subscription-service && npm run prisma:deploy && cd ../notification-service && npm run prisma:deploy
scripts.db:reset: cd auth-services && npm run prisma:reset && cd ../user-services && npm run prisma:reset && cd ../subscription-service && npm run prisma:reset && cd ../notification-service && npm run prisma:reset
